description: Without axis labels, readers cannot immediately tell what the x-axis categories represent or what unit the y-axis measures — the tick marks showing age ranges and numbers like "10" to "10,000" are ambiguous without context. A viewer unfamiliar with the dataset would have no way to know whether the y-axis shows raw counts, rates, percentages, or something else entirely. The missing titles force the reader to guess the meaning of both axes, undermining the chart's interpretability.
